body_preview: Reduce commands_state.rs by moving ~600 lines of event file IO and formatting utility functions into a new `commands_state_io.rs` module. This is the second extraction task — it targets the IO/formatting layer that sits between the command handlers and the report builders. Why this matters: commands_state.rs is 23,839 lines — the single largest file in the c
expected_evidence: commands_state.rs line count decreases measurably (combined with task_01) Task lineage shows FileEdited events for commands_state.rs and new commands_state_io.rs Build and tests pass; no regression in state subcommand behaviors
title: Extract event IO and formatting utilities from commands_state.rs
